requirements.acceptance: README has a clear copy/install/restart/verify flow for installing the plugin into a Hermes plugins directory without implying new tooling.
README identifies agent._tps_snapshot, the active CLI instance hook expectation, snapshot fields, and recommended status-bar display behavior.

requirements.text: Explain stale and cross-session suppression rules
requirements.acceptance: README instructs consumers to calculate age with time.monotonic() - snapshot["updated_monotonic"] and to suppress or clear values when stale or session-mismatched.

README describes get_tps_stats(session_id), get_observability_contract(), privacy diagnostics/redaction behavior, and explicitly says REST/WebSocket/Prometheus surfaces are unavailable when the contract marks them unavailable.
README includes symptoms, likely causes, and checks for no TPS, stale TPS, privacy-redacted identifiers, zero stats, missing optional surfaces, and plugin registration failures.
README examples use field names and env vars present in __init__.py and plugin metadata from plugin.yaml; no docs claim unsupported routes or exporters exist.
Final diff changes only documentation files for this bead's implementation phase unless later planning explicitly authorizes otherwise.

success_criteria: README contains a quickstart that lets a Hermes user install, restart, and verify the plugin's basic TPS behavior.
README documents status-bar integration with freshness and session-mismatch rules.
README summarizes current observability surfaces without claiming absent endpoints exist.
README includes a troubleshooting guide for common installation, display, stale data, privacy, and observability-surface issues.
